Major Updates

Release Canidate #1 (4/15/25)
Weekly Update #8 (4/13/25)
Weekly Update #7 (4/9/25)



Weekly Update #8 Released!

April 13, 2025 - FL Team


Greetings and salutations players! As we prepare for the first release candidate, our 8th weekly update contains additions to MVM, a couple more cosmetics, and a nice chunk of bugfixes!

Release Candidate?


Yes! As you may have seen posted in the Discord server, we're currently hoping to release on or near April 20th! This might mean that updates could be a bit scarse for the time being, but know that big things are cooking up behind the scenes!

From everyone at the Fortress-Life Team, we'd like to thank our playtesters and contributors! This project could not have gotten to it's current state without all of you!

With all of that being said, let's get on to the changes!



Gameplay Changes


  • All of Gordon's weapons now have functioning upgrades for MVM!
    I am so sorry for you, 4:3 players.
  • Gordon now has a model for his Reanimator hologram!
  • Enemies will now be pinned to the wall if killed using Gordon's crossbow!

Cosmetic Additions

  • Added "Time Traveler's Hat" based on Hat Kid's Hat from "A Hat in Time"

Bug Fixes


  • All of Gordon's viewmodels have been modified to look nicer at viewmodel FOVs above default.
  • Gordon now has a HUD icon for Passtime.
  • Gordon now appears in the disguise kit's hud.
  • Gordon's weapons now use the kill icons provided by Fortress Connected.
  • Fixed dmg_mult on Gordon's weapons.

Community Showcase

You good over there, Gordon?
Screenshot by DT4302


This isn't gonna end well, is it?
Screenshot by 0x5066 (Eris Lund)



At last, we finally meet again.

We feel that a lot of what we wanted to say was already said earlier. We'll host a playtest for this update some time soon, and we hope to see you all there! Have a lovely week and we'll see you later!
